name: vaultwarden
title: Vaultwarden
description: Lightweight, self-hosted Bitwarden-compatible password manager written in Rust. Uses ~50MB RAM, works with all official Bitwarden clients (browser, desktop, mobile). Requires HTTPS via Traefik or reverse proxy.

variables.name: VAULTWARDEN_DOMAIN
variables.label: Domain
variables.description: Full URL including https:// (required for client connections)
